description_long: This object is a flat, rectangular computer monitor with a sleek, modern design. The front features a vibrant display showing a water lily and green leaves, surrounded by a thin, metallic bezel that frames the screen. The bezel is silver-gray and appears to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with a smooth, slightly reflective finish. The monitor is very slim when viewed from the side, with no visible stand or support structure, suggesting it may be wall-mounted or designed for minimal desk footprint. The back of the monitor is plain and solid black, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding. There are no visible physical controls or logos on any side of the monitor.
description: A slim, modern computer monitor with a metallic bezel and vibrant display, featuring a water lily image. The design is minimalist, with no visible stand, buttons, or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display with a water lily image, framed by a thin metallic bezel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the monitor's extremely slim profile, with no visible stand or controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the monitor's thinness and lack of visible components.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, metallic silver-gray, with a smooth and slightly reflective finish. It has sharp, clean corners and no visible decorative elements or texture.
attribute_stand_type: No stand is visible; the monitor appears to lack a base or support structure in the provided views.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
